criticalRules: Control port is input event (not clock)
dState must be kept for counter persistence
description: Event counter block - counts events and outputs the accumulated count
anomalies: dState exists but state is empty - uses discrete state
Control port for event counting (signals incremental)
3-parameter exprs: initial value, max count, increment direction
Multiple integer parameters [1, 2, 0] for internal counter configuration
name: Counter
